data.name: Alerts_Subtitle
data.value: FlareAlert - inline feedback with severities, variants, icons and dismiss.

data.name: AlertDemo_ErrorBody
data.value: Something went wrong. Click × to dismiss.

data.name: AlertDemo_FilledBody
data.value: Filled is the default variant - a solid tonal container.

data.name: AlertDemo_OutlinedBody
data.value: Outlined uses a transparent fill with a coloured border.

data.name: AlertDemo_TextBody
data.value: Text has no background or border - just coloured content.

data.name: AlertDemo_CustomIconBody
data.value: Provide your own glyph through the Icon slot.

data.name: AlertDemo_NoIconBody
data.value: Set NoIcon to hide the leading icon entirely.

data.name: AlertDemo_NoTitleBody
data.value: A title is optional - this alert shows body content only.

data.name: Accordion_Subtitle
data.value: Collapsible panels that reveal content one (or many) at a time.

data.name: AccordionDemo_A1
data.value: Flare is a Blazor component library with runtime theme switching between Material Design 3 and Fluent UI 2.

data.name: AccordionDemo_A2
data.value: All components use CSS custom properties (--flare-*). Switching themes updates every variable in one call - no page reload.

data.name: AccordionDemo_A3
data.value: Yes - Flare is MIT licensed and available on GitHub.

data.name: AccordionDemo_ShippingBody
data.value: Free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Express options available at checkout.

data.name: AccordionDemo_ReturnsBody
data.value: Return any item within 30 days for a full refund - no questions asked.

data.name: AccordionDemo_WarrantyBody
data.value: Every product is covered by a two-year limited manufacturer warranty.

data.name: AccordionDemo_DefaultOpenBody
data.value: This panel starts open because Expanded="true" was set.

data.name: AccordionDemo_BoundBody
data.value: Toggling this panel updates the bound field via ExpandedChanged.

data.name: Avatar_Subtitle
data.value: FlareAvatar - sizes, shapes, image and text fallback.

data.name: Badge_Subtitle
data.value: FlareBadge for counts, dots and standalone status pills.

data.name: Chip_Subtitle
data.value: FlareChip for tags, filters and selections.

data.name: Breadcrumb_Subtitle
data.value: FlareBreadcrumb - navigation trail with custom separators and collapsing.

data.name: Pagination_Subtitle
data.value: FlarePagination with sizing, colors and page-size selection.

data.name: Calendar_Subtitle
data.value: FlareCalendar - monthly calendar with event display, day selection, and navigation.

data.name: Cards_Subtitle
data.value: FlareCard - Elevated, Filled, Outlined, Tonal, and Text variants with sizes, compact layout, and selection.

data.name: Carousel_Subtitle
data.value: FlareCarousel - swipeable slides with auto-play, arrows, and dot indicators.

data.name: Charts_Subtitle
data.value: FlareChart - SVG-based Line, Bar, Pie, and Donut charts. No external dependencies.

data.name: ChipGroup_Subtitle
data.value: FlareChipGroup - a container for FlareChip items supporting single and multi-select modes.

data.name: ColorModeToggle_Subtitle
data.value: FlareColorModeToggle - a button that switches between light and dark themes via FlareThemeProvider.

data.name: ColorModeToggle_UsageText
data.value: FlareColorModeToggle requires FlareThemeProvider to be present in the component tree. The toggle reads and writes the active theme via the injected IThemeService.

data.name: ColorPicker_Subtitle
data.value: FlareColorPicker with hex value binding and preview swatch.

data.name: Ide_Subtitle
data.value: Compose a desktop-style IDE shell - ribbon, menu bar, document tabs, dockable tool panels, resizable splitter, and status bar - entirely from Flare components.

data.name: DataGrid_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDataGrid with sortable columns, pagination, grouping, CSV export, row selection, column resize, and inline editing.

data.name: Dialog_Subtitle
data.value: Inline @bind-Visible dialog, service-based confirm and alert.

data.name: Drawer_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDrawer - slides in from any edge with Header and ChildContent slots.

data.name: EmptyState_Subtitle
data.value: FlareEmptyState - a placeholder shown when a list or view has no content to display.

data.name: FileUpload_Subtitle
data.value: FlareFileUpload and FlareDropZone for file input with drag & drop support.

data.name: FormBuilder_Subtitle
data.value: Model-driven form generation. Decorate properties with [FlareFormField] for custom labels and ordering.

data.name: Forms_Subtitle
data.value: EditForm with DataAnnotationsValidator and Flare form controls.

data.name: Image_Subtitle
data.value: FlareImage with object-fit, aspect ratio, fluid, lazy loading, and skeleton placeholder.

data.name: Input_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTextField - text field with label, helper, icons, error and read-only.

data.name: NumericField_Subtitle
data.value: FlareNumericField - typed numeric input with min/max, step, format, prefix/suffix.

data.name: TextArea_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTextArea - multiline input with rows and max length.

data.name: Radio_Subtitle
data.value: FlareRadioGroup - single choice, inline or stacked.

data.name: Kanban_Subtitle
data.value: FlareKanban - drag-and-drop task board with columns and cards.

data.name: Stack_Subtitle
data.value: FlareStack - flex row/column layout with gap, alignment and a spacer.

data.name: Grid_Subtitle
data.value: FlareGrid / FlareCol - a 12-column grid with responsive spans.

data.name: Divider_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDivider - horizontal/vertical rule with optional centered text.

data.name: Resizable_Subtitle
data.value: FlareResizable - drag an edge to resize the panel.

data.name: ScrollTop_Subtitle
data.value: FlareScrollTop - a back-to-top button shown past a scroll threshold.

data.name: LayoutShell_Subtitle
data.value: FlareLayout - ready-made admin shell with app bar, collapsible drawer, and main content area.

data.name: LayoutShell_AutoWireDesc
data.value: Add DrawerToggle="true" to FlareLayoutAppBar - the hamburger icon appears and toggles the drawer automatically via a cascading context. No manual binding needed.

data.name: LayoutShell_ManualBindDesc
data.value: Use @bind-DrawerOpen for full external control - useful when you need to programmatically open/close from a parent component.

data.name: Link_Subtitle
data.value: FlareLink with color and underline variants.

data.name: List_Subtitle
data.value: FlareList with Leading/Trailing slots, selection and a dense mode.

data.name: Tree_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTreeView with nested items, icons and multi-select.

data.name: Menu_Subtitle
data.value: FlareMenu with icon items and anchor alignment.

data.name: MultiSelect_Subtitle
data.value: FlareMultiSelect - a dropdown that allows selecting multiple values from a list.

data.name: OnThisPage_Subtitle
data.value: FlareOnThisPage - a scroll-spy table of contents that collects (and auto-creates) page anchors.

data.name: OnThisPage_Demo
data.value: Table of contents with auto anchors

data.name: Overlay_Subtitle
data.value: FlareOverlay - full-screen backdrop with light and dark variants.

data.name: Popover_Subtitle
data.value: FlarePopover anchored content with placements and an optional arrow.

data.name: PasswordInput_Subtitle
data.value: FlarePasswordField - a text field with a built-in show/hide toggle for passwords.

data.name: DatePicker_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDatePicker - calendar field with min/max, format and today/clear actions.

data.name: TimePicker_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTimePicker - select a time of day.

data.name: DateRangePicker_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDateRangePicker - pick a start and end date.

data.name: DateTimePicker_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDateTimePicker - combined date and time selection.

data.name: Progress_Subtitle
data.value: FlareProgress - linear and circular indicators with sizes, colors and buffer.

data.name: QrCode_Subtitle
data.value: FlareQrCode - renders a fully scannable SVG QR code from any string value.

data.name: RichTextEditor_Subtitle
data.value: FlareRichTextEditor - WYSIWYG editor with formatting toolbar, powered by a custom JS command bus.

data.name: Select_Subtitle
data.value: FlareSelect - a styled dropdown with item templates, grouping and validation.

data.name: Autocomplete_Subtitle
data.value: FlareAutocomplete with async search, grouping and item templates.

data.name: SignaturePad_Subtitle
data.value: FlareSignaturePad - draw and capture a freehand signature on a canvas.

data.name: Slider_Subtitle
data.value: FlareSlider - single value, range (two handles), sizes, colors & vertical.

data.name: Splitter_Subtitle
data.value: FlareSplitter - resizable split panes (horizontal/vertical) with a draggable gutter.

data.name: Table_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTable - default, striped+compact, bordered, sticky header, grouped rows, and totals footer.

data.name: Tabs_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTabs - variants, closeable, vertical, scrollable, badges and header zones.

data.name: TagInput_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTagField - unbounded, max tags, and readonly variants.

data.name: Timeline_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTimeline with color-coded entries, connector variants, and alternating layout.

data.name: Tooltip_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTooltip with Top, Bottom, Left, Right placements.

data.name: Clipboard_Subtitle
data.value: FlareClipboard - copy text with feedback and a custom trigger.

data.name: Clipboard_Basic
data.value: Copy with feedback, OnCopied & custom slot

data.name: Transfer_Subtitle
data.value: FlareTransfer - move items between two lists. Useful for permission editors and multi-select scenarios.

data.name: VideoPlayer_Subtitle
data.value: FlareVideoPlayer - HTML5 video with Flare-themed custom controls.

data.name: VirtualList_Subtitle
data.value: FlareVirtualList renders only visible rows for large datasets.

data.name: InfiniteScroll_Subtitle
data.value: FlareInfiniteScroll loads more content as the user reaches the bottom.

data.name: Lazy_Subtitle
data.value: FlareLazy defers building a subtree until it scrolls near the viewport - render a page of heavy items while only the visible ones actually exist.

data.name: Lazy_Defer_Desc
data.value: Each panel's component tree is built only when it nears the viewport. Watch the mounted counter climb as you scroll.

data.name: Lazy_DataLoad_Desc
data.value: Use OnRevealed to start fetching only when the block appears; a Placeholder reserves the space until the data arrives.

data.name: DataTree_Subtitle
data.value: Data-driven tree (FlareDataTree) with lazy-loading children and Virtual="true" for efficient scrolling over thousands of nodes.

data.name: Color_Subtitle
data.value: The unified FlareColor system - semantic roles, custom values, and color generators.

data.name: Color_RolesDesc
data.value: Every color-aware component takes a single Color parameter of type FlareColor. A semantic role renders via a shared, cached CSS class and stays theme-aware in both Material Design 3 and Fluent UI 2.

data.name: Color_UsageDesc
data.value: Pass a role preset, an arbitrary CSS color, or any string (implicit conversion). Role expressions like var(--flare-color-primary) resolve back to the fast class path.

data.name: Color_GeneratorsDesc
data.value: FlareColor.Random() returns an arbitrary #RRGGBB color. color.Next() returns the next color by rotating its hue by the golden angle - deterministic and well-spread, ideal for coloring a sequence (chart series, avatars, chips).

data.name: Color_SequenceDesc
data.value: Starting from the current color, each swatch is the previous one's Next().

data.name: Theming_GenerateTitle
data.value: Generate a palette from a color

data.name: Theming_GenerateDesc
data.value: Pick a brand color; Palette.FromColors derives a full light + dark palette (brand roles, tinted neutrals, readable on-colors) and applies it on the fly.

data.name: Theming_ScopeDesc
data.value: FlareThemeScope re-themes just its subtree. Any axis left unset inherits from the surrounding theme - here only Mode is overridden, so this island stays dark (or light) regardless of the app theme.

data.name: GettingStarted_Subtitle
data.value: Add Flare to a Blazor Server or WebAssembly project in minutes.

data.name: GettingStarted_RequirementsDesc
data.value: .NET 10 SDK, and a Blazor WebAssembly or Blazor Server project (both are supported).

data.name: GettingStarted_DiSetupDesc
data.value: Register Flare in Program.cs. AddFlare also registers ISnackbarService, IDialogService and IMessageBoxService, so no separate registration is needed.

data.name: GettingStarted_StylesDesc
data.value: Add the bootstrap script, the component CSS and (optionally) the Material Symbols font to your host page. The active theme's CSS is wired up automatically by FlareThemeProvider.

data.name: GettingStarted_ThemeProviderDesc
data.value: Wrap your router in FlareThemeProvider. Automatic dark mode is on by default (it watches prefers-color-scheme); turn it off with RespectSystemColorScheme="false".

data.name: GettingStarted_FormValidationDesc
data.value: Flare integrates fully with Blazor's standard EditContext and DataAnnotations.

data.name: GettingStarted_DialogSnackbarDesc
data.value: Call dialogs and toasts from typed services; just add the providers once in your layout.

data.name: GettingStarted_DockerDesc
data.value: Run the Gallery PWA in a container.

data.name: Theming_Subtitle
data.value: Runtime theme switching with CSS custom properties. No page reload required.

data.name: Theming_AutoDarkModeDesc
data.value: FlareThemeProvider has RespectSystemColorScheme="true" by default. When no theme has been manually saved, the provider subscribes to the OS prefers-color-scheme media query via matchMedia. If the user changes their system appearance while the app is open, the theme auto-switches between the registered light and dark variants - no page reload required.

data.name: Theming_AutoDarkModeNote
data.value: Once a user manually selects a theme (saved to storage), auto-switching is disabled for that session until storage is cleared.

data.name: Theming_HowItWorksDesc
data.value: All Flare components use CSS custom properties (--flare-*). When you call ThemeService.SetThemeAsync(id), a single JavaScript call updates all token values in the document root - no component re-render, no page reload.

data.name: Theming_CustomThemeDesc
data.value: To create a custom theme, implement the ITheme interface and fill a ThemeTokenSet with your token values. Set it as the default via AddFlare(opts => opts.DefaultTheme = new MyTheme()), or register it at startup as an extra selectable theme through IThemeService.RegisterTheme(new MyTheme()).

data.name: Theming_Token_OnSurfaceVariant
data.value: Secondary text and icons on surfaces

data.name: Home_Subtitle
data.value: Beautiful Blazor components with runtime theme switching

data.name: Home_ThemeShowcaseHint
data.value: switch themes below to see all components update instantly.

data.name: Highlighter_Subtitle
data.value: FlareHighlighter for inline text search highlighting, FlareCodeEditor for syntax-highlighted code input.

data.name: Markdown_Subtitle
data.value: FlareMarkdown - pure C# Markdown-to-HTML renderer. No JavaScript, no external packages.

data.name: ToggleButton_Subtitle
data.value: FlareToggleButton and FlareToggleGroup - stateful toggle controls.

data.name: GettingStarted_Installation_NuGetDesc
data.value: Add Flare.Components and a theme package to your project.

data.name: GettingStarted_Installation_Alert
data.value: Flare targets .NET 10. Make sure your project targets net10.0.

data.name: GettingStarted_Installation_ImportsDesc
data.value: Add the Material Symbols font and Flare CSS to App.razor, then import namespaces in _Imports.razor.

data.name: GettingStarted_ThemeSetup_ProviderDesc
data.value: Wrap your app in FlareThemeProvider. It applies the active theme CSS and responds to system color-scheme changes.

data.name: GettingStarted_ThemeSetup_LiveHint
data.value: Try toggling the color mode live:

data.name: GettingStarted_FirstComponent_ButtonDesc
data.value: FlareButton supports Filled, Outlined, Text, Tonal and Elevated variants.

data.name: GettingStarted_FirstComponent_TextFieldDesc
data.value: Use @bind-Value for two-way data binding. HelperText appears below the field.

data.name: GettingStarted_Architecture_BaseDesc
data.value: All Flare components inherit FlareComponentBase which provides Class, Style, Id and AdditionalAttributes pass-through.

data.name: GettingStarted_Architecture_TokensDesc
data.value: Flare exposes all visual values as CSS custom properties. Switching themes swaps the token values - no re-render required.

data.name: GettingStarted_Accessibility_AriaDesc
data.value: Always provide AriaLabel for icon-only controls. Decorative icons auto-receive aria-hidden="true".

data.name: GettingStarted_Icons_BasicDesc
data.value: FlareIcon checks the built-in SVG pack first, then falls back to Material Symbols via the Google Fonts CDN.

data.name: GettingStarted_Icons_SizesDesc
data.value: Use SizePx (int) for SVG pack icons or Size (CSS string) for Material Symbols.

data.name: GettingStarted_Icons_FallbackTip
data.value: Unknown icon names automatically fall back to Material Symbols - no extra configuration needed.

data.name: Icons_Subtitle
data.value: Built-in SVG icon pack and Material Symbols reference. Click any icon to copy its usage.

data.name: DropZone_Subtitle
data.value: FlareDropZone - drag & drop file upload area with customizable styling.

data.name: Paper_Subtitle
data.value: FlarePaper - material surface with configurable elevation and rounded corners.

data.name: AvatarGroup_Subtitle
data.value: FlareAvatarGroup - stack overlapping avatars with an overflow counter.

data.name: Comparison_Subtitle
data.value: How Flare compares to other Blazor component libraries

data.name: IconButton_Subtitle
data.value: Compact, icon-only buttons in standard, filled, tonal and outlined variants.

data.name: ButtonGroup_Subtitle
data.value: Connected sets of buttons sharing variant, color and size. In the MD3 Expressive theme segments are separated by a gap with rounded inner corners and morph into a full capsule on interaction.

data.name: SplitButton_Subtitle
data.value: A primary action paired with a dropdown trigger for related secondary actions.

data.name: Fab_Subtitle
data.value: A prominent button for the primary action of a screen, available in color roles, sizes and an extended form with a label.

data.name: FabMenu_Subtitle
data.value: A floating action button that expands into a set of related actions in a chosen direction.

data.name: Api_Empty
data.value: No documented public API for this component.

data.name: Services_DynamicSubtitle
data.value: Extract a seed color from a cover with IFlareColorExtractor, then theme components with FlareColor.Dynamic.

data.name: Services_DynamicHint
data.value: Cross-origin URLs need CORS; uploaded files always work. Seed:

data.name: Services_ScopeSubtitle
data.value: FlareThemeScope re-themes a subtree. The same components rendered under different themes, palettes and modes - all live on one page.

data.name: Services_ClipboardSubtitle
data.value: IFlareClipboard - copy and read text (with a non-secure-context fallback) without touching IJSRuntime.

data.name: Services_SnackbarSubtitle
data.value: ISnackbarService.Show(...) enqueues a transient notification from anywhere - severities, duration and an optional action.

data.name: Services_DownloadSubtitle
data.value: IFlareDownload triggers a client-side file download from in-memory content (text, CSV with BOM, etc.).

data.name: Services_MsgBoxSubtitle
data.value: IMessageBoxService - awaitable Confirm / Alert / Prompt dialogs from C#, no markup required.

data.name: Services_VersionCheckSubtitle
data.value: IVersionCheckService polls for a newer app version on a configurable interval and raises an event - it renders nothing itself.

data.name: Services_VersionCheckBody
data.value: Register it with AddFlareVersionCheck (interval, current version, how to fetch the latest), subscribe to NewVersionAvailable in your layout and surface the update however you like - here it shows a toast.

data.name: Services_VersionCheckNote
data.value: This demo polls every 10 seconds in service-worker mode: a toast appears only after you publish a newer build (the deployed assets-manifest version changes).

data.name: Services_VersionCheckUpToDate
data.value: Up to date - no newer version

data.name: Services_VersionCheckSimNote
data.value: Simulated demo: a local probe reports a newer version after a couple of checks, so you can see the full flow (up to date -> new version -> update) without publishing a new build.

data.name: Api_IndexSubtitle
data.value: Auto-generated parameter, event and method reference for every Flare component.

data.name: OtpField_Subtitle
data.value: One-time password input with auto-focus, paste support, and keyboard navigation.

data.name: Responsive_Subtitle
data.value: Resize the window to see Flare adapt. Breakpoints: xs <600 · sm ≥600 · md ≥960 · lg ≥1280 · xl ≥1920.

data.name: Responsive_GridDescB
data.value: - 1 per row on phones, 2 on tablets, 3-4 on desktop.

data.name: Responsive_VisMdUp
data.value: Visible only on md and up (hidden below 960px).

data.name: Responsive_MediaQueryDesc
data.value: exposes the active breakpoint to your C# logic - switch layouts, column counts, or drawer modes dynamically.
